Reparation  

Description

1: Resurrect and restore 20% experience

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 250 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 6 Recast Time: 20
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 200
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Deletable: Yes Blockable: Yes
Focusable: Yes Dispellable: Yes
Interruptable: Yes Target Type: Corpse
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Game Description

Revives a slain ally, restoring 20% of their lost experience. It takes some time for the recently revived to fully recover.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Reparation

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Reparation
ClassLevel
CLR22
PAL31
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (26)
  • Sold By (14)
  • Screenshots
Add Image
Post Comment
Confirmed, Egasia Reenix.
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2021 at 7:34 PM Rating: Decent
wizen
Scholar
36 posts
Sold by Egasia Reenix in East Freeport Cleric Guild. Top floor, up elevator, and look left. 2.380p at amiable to a Human Paladin of Karana on the new Mischief type TLP.
▲ Page top
Confirmed, Egasia Reenix.
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2021 at 12:43 PM Rating: Excellent

wizen wrote:
Sold by Egasia Reenix in East Freeport Cleric Guild. Top floor, up elevator, and look left. 2.380p at amiable to a Human Paladin of Karana on the new Mischief type TLP.


Thanks, added. She's in West Freeport though.

This spell is NOT sold in Paineel, we just have to buy it in Freeport, Top floor of the Clerics guild, (You have to touch the secret elevator) From Egasia Reenix 1475.80, -1644.45, 16.77
